title: How enterprises use AI for accurate decision making - Facebook
full_text:
FICO's Post
FICO
May 19 ·
Most enterprises have invested in AI. Few have the infrastructure to make it count.
In a new piece for The Wall Street Journal , FICO President of Software Nikhil Behl unpacks what it takes to use AI for decisions that are accurate, explainable, and defensible at scale.
From fraud detection to loan pricing to agentic AI, the companies getting this right aren't just better at technology. They're better at connecting every insight to every consequential decision, every time.
Read the Q&A online and in today's paper at #FICOWorld26 : https://partners.wsj.com/.../how-enterprises-use-ai-for.../
#FICOWorld #Innovation #AI
